Package index

Launch Cerebro

launchCerebro()
Launch Cerebro interface.
launchCerebroV1.0()
Launch Cerebro v1.0
launchCerebroV1.1()
Launch Cerebro v1.1
launchCerebroV1.2()
Launch Cerebro v1.2
launchCerebroV1.3()
Launch Cerebro v1.3
launchCerebroV1.4()
Launch Cerebro v1.4

Export data

exportFromSCE()
Export SingleCellExperiment (SCE) object to Cerebro.
exportFromSeurat()
Export Seurat object to Cerebro.

Pre-processing

addPercentMtRibo()
Add percentage of mitochondrial and ribosomal transcripts.
calculatePercentGenes()
Calculate percentage of transcripts of gene list.
getMostExpressedGenes()
Get most expressed genes for specified grouping variables in Seurat object.
getMarkerGenes()
Get marker genes for specified grouping variables in Seurat object.
getEnrichedPathways()
Get enriched pathways based on marker genes from EnrichR.
performGeneSetEnrichmentAnalysis()
Perform gene set enrichment analysis with GSVA.
extractMonocleTrajectory()
Extract trajectory from Monocle and add to Seurat object.

Internal

Cerebro_v1.3
R6 class in which data sets will be stored for visualization in Cerebro.
addPercentMtRibo()
Add percentage of mitochondrial and ribosomal transcripts.
calculatePercentGenes()
Calculate percentage of transcripts of gene list.
convertSeuratToCerebro()
Convert Seurat Object to Cerebro Format
createShinyApp()
Create a self-contained Shiny app folder for Cerebro v1.4
.read_GMT_file()
Read GMT file.
.send_enrichr_query()
Gene enrichment using Enrichr.
exportFromSCE()
Export SingleCellExperiment (SCE) object to Cerebro.
exportFromSeurat()
Export Seurat object to Cerebro.
extractMonocleTrajectory()
Extract trajectory from Monocle and add to Seurat object.
getEnrichedPathways()
Get enriched pathways based on marker genes from EnrichR.
getMarkerGenes()
Get marker genes for specified grouping variables in Seurat object.
getMostExpressedGenes()
Get most expressed genes for specified grouping variables in Seurat object.
launchCerebro()
Launch Cerebro interface.
launchCerebroV1.0()
Launch Cerebro v1.0
launchCerebroV1.1()
Launch Cerebro v1.1
launchCerebroV1.2()
Launch Cerebro v1.2
launchCerebroV1.3()
Launch Cerebro v1.3
launchCerebroV1.4()
Launch Cerebro v1.4
performGeneSetEnrichmentAnalysis()
Perform gene set enrichment analysis with GSVA.
